_comment: TQNN MCP Server — maps each employee (username, matching tqnn_mcp_users.json) to a DMM sub-credential pair generated via the appliance ACL console (tqnn_acl_manager.php 'generate' action). Dataset access itself is controlled there, NOT here — this file only decides which sub-credential a given employee's MCP calls use. Employees with no entry below fall back to 'default'. To grant several datasets to one employee, generate a single sub-credential scoped to multiple datasets in the ACL console and reference it here — do not list multiple datasets in this file.
